actions_taken.description: Created and pushed ralph-workflow-v0.8.8 tag to trigger PyPI CI publish pipeline

actions_taken.description: Fixed stale GitHub auth blocker data in marketing audit logs — git SSH authenticated, gh CLI unauthenticated

key_discoveries: GitHub SSH is fully operational — pushed ralph-workflow-v0.8.8 tag successfully
PyPI CI is 90% ready: build passes, just needs Trusted Publishing configured on PyPI (or PYPI_TOKEN secret added to GitHub Actions)
SEO content gap analysis now shows 100% coverage (fixed from 12.5% false negative — sitemap scan added to content_gap_analysis())
Title extraction bug in run_posting.py fixed — frontmatter title takes priority, code-heading guard prevents .ralph/config.yml-style extraction

rank_2.description: SEO content gap coverage is now 100% (verified). Priority shifts from content creation to backlink building per corrected SEO report.

rank_3.description: 25 Telegraph cross-posts missing completed_at field (non-blocking data gap)

hold_window_rule_compliance: Executed concrete runtime repair (tag push + blocker fix) per hold-window constraint against emitting more prompt/rerun tweaks. PyPI deploy is 90% complete — tag exists on GitHub, CI builds successfully, just needs OIDC config on PyPI side.
